description: QCB eKYC: liveness detection requirement vs Madad onboarding policy

input.control_statement: The regulated entity must implement a liveness detection mechanism as part of the electronic Know Your Customer (eKYC) process to ensure the physical presence of the customer and prevent spoofing attacks using photographs, videos, or masks.

metadata.notes: Section 2.5 and 2.6 of the Madad policy address eKYC security and IT infrastructure including liveness detection
